subcodes.first_line: O pure friends of God! All the multitudes of the world are expectantly waiting, their thoughts bent upon the rending of the veil [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پاک یزدان همه گروه انبوه جهان چشم براهند و در اندیشه پرده برانداختن
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @call to action, @Manifestation of God as sun
